description: Barrier Discount Certificate pricer (SSPA 1210). European barrier observed at maturity only. Issued at a discount; investor gives up downside below the barrier in exchange for a discount at inception.

required_fields.name: maturity_date
required_fields.description: Maturity date / Final Fixing Date (DD-MM-YYYY or YYYY-MM-DD)

required_fields.name: underlyings
required_fields.description: List with one underlying equity object

item_fields.name: strike_pct
item_fields.description: Strike as % of initial fixing — used to derive conversion_ratio

item_fields.name: barrier_pct
item_fields.description: European barrier as % of initial fixing (typically above 100)

item_fields.name: conversion_ratio
item_fields.description: Optional — derived as denomination / strike_level if absent

optional_fields.name: quanto_adjustment
optional_fields.description: Annualised quanto drift correction (rho_stock_fx × sigma_stock × sigma_fx). Use when underlying and settlement currencies differ.

optional_fields.name: coupon_schedule
optional_fields.description: List of {date, amount} for any periodic coupon payments (uncommon for discount certificates)

optional_fields.name: mc_time_steps
optional_fields.description: Number of time steps per simulated path

optional_fields.name: issuer_spread_bp
optional_fields.description: Z-spread override; falls back to credit_spread_bp if absent
